summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CSV upload async background job fix (Cloudflare 520). All core functionality working correctly: immediate non-blocking upload response, background job processing, live progress polling, and frontend integration.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/v1/admin/upload-csv returns immediately with job_id (0.67s for 100k rows)
Backend: Validation counts correct (CIN, LLPIN, duplicates, rejected)
Backend: Upsert behavior works (updates on re-upload)
Backend: Large CSV upload (100k rows) - submitted in 0.67s, completed in 10.4s
Frontend: Data Upload card renders with all elements
Frontend: File upload (2003 rows) submitted successfully
Frontend: Upload completes and result panel shows correct counts
Frontend: All enrichment dashboard elements present (KPI cards, progress bar, governance, instructions, sessions table)
